summary: After CEO arrest, custodial MPC keys were drained from at least 6 token vaults across the protocol, leading to silent withdrawals of WBTC, WETH, USDC, USDT.
attack_trace: Withdraw signing material from compromised MPC node
Submit AnySwapOut signed messages to deplete vaults
Repeat across Fantom anyTokens until pools are dry
root_cause: Centralized custody of MPC key shares plus operational compromise of node operators.
